instructions: Start in a plank position with hands under shoulders. Lower your body until your chest nearly touches the floor, then push back up.
common_mistakes: Sagging hips: Keep your body in a straight line.
tips: Engage your core throughout the movement.

instructions: Lie face down, then lift your body onto your toes and forearms, keeping your body straight. Hold this position.
common_mistakes: Dropping hips: Maintain a straight line from head to heels.

instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body by bending knees and hips, keeping your back straight, then return to standing.
common_mistakes: Knees caving in: Keep knees aligned with toes.
tips: Keep your weight on your heels.

instructions: Step forward with one leg and lower your hips until both knees are bent at about 90 degrees. Push back to the starting position.
common_mistakes: Front knee extending past toes: Keep knee above ankle.

instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart. Bend at hips and knees to grip the barbell. Lift by straightening hips and knees, keeping the bar close to your body.
common_mistakes: Rounding back: Keep spine neutral.

instructions: Lie on a bench with feet flat on the floor. Grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder-width. Lower the bar to your chest, then press it back up.
common_mistakes: Bouncing bar off chest: Lower with control.

instructions: Hang from a bar with palms facing away. Pull your body up until your chin is above the bar, then lower back down.
common_mistakes: Using momentum: Perform controlled movements.
tips: Engage your scapulae at the start.

instructions: Stand with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward. Curl the weights while keeping upper arms stationary, then lower.
common_mistakes: Swinging weights: Keep elbows stationary.
tips: Control the movement both up and down.

instructions: Sit on the edge of a bench. Place hands next to hips, slide hips off, and lower body by bending elbows. Push back up.
common_mistakes: Shoulders hunching: Keep shoulders down.

instructions: Hold dumbbells at shoulder height with palms facing forward. Press the weights overhead until arms are straight, then lower.
common_mistakes: Arching back: Engage core to stabilize.
tips: Don't lock elbows at the top.

instructions: Sit on the leg press machine with feet shoulder-width apart on the platform. Push the platform away by extending your knees.
common_mistakes: Locking knees: Keep a slight bend.

instructions: Stand upright. Push through the balls of your feet to raise your body upward, then lower back down.
common_mistakes: Rolling ankles: Keep movement controlled.

instructions: Sit on the floor with knees bent. Lean back slightly and twist your torso to the right, then to the left.
common_mistakes: Using momentum: Move deliberately.

instructions: Start in a plank position. Quickly draw one knee to your chest, then switch legs, continuing in a running motion.
common_mistakes: Hips rising: Keep body in a straight line.

instructions: From standing, drop into a squat with hands on the ground. Kick feet back into a plank, return to squat, then jump up.
common_mistakes: Skipping steps: Perform each movement fully.

instructions: Lie face down on the leg curl machine. Curl your legs toward your buttocks by bending your knees, then lower.
common_mistakes: Lifting hips: Keep hips down.
tips: Adjust machine to fit your body.

instructions: Sit at a lat pulldown machine. Grip the bar wider than shoulder-width and pull it down to your upper chest, then release.
common_mistakes: Leaning back: Keep torso upright.

instructions: Lie on a bench with dumbbells in each hand, arms extended above chest. Lower arms out to sides, then bring back together.
common_mistakes: Overstretching: Stop at shoulder level.
tips: Keep a slight bend in elbows.

instructions: Sit at a rowing machine with feet secured. Pull the handle toward your waist while keeping your back straight, then extend arms.
common_mistakes: Rounding shoulders: Keep chest open.

instructions: Stand in front of a bench. Step onto the bench with one foot, press through the heel to lift your body up, then step down.
common_mistakes: Pushing off lower leg: Use leading leg.

instructions: Hold a barbell with an overhand grip. Hinge at hips to lower the bar down the front of your legs, then return upright.
common_mistakes: Rounding back: Maintain neutral spine.

instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent. Lift hips toward the ceiling by squeezing glutes, then lower.
common_mistakes: Overarching back: Engage core.

instructions: Start with feet together and arms by sides. Jump to spread feet and raise arms overhead, then return to start position.
common_mistakes: Not fully extending: Make complete movements.

instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent. Place hands behind head, then lift shoulders off the floor using abdominal muscles.
common_mistakes: Pulling neck: Let abs do the work.
